examples.title: Function Point Metrics Calculator
examples.description: Calculates the Function Point Metrics value based on the Unadjusted Function Point (UFP) and Value Adjustment Factor (VAF)
examples.code:
FUNCTION calculate_FP(UFP, VAF)
  FP = UFP x VAF
  RETURN FP
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode calculates the Function Point Metrics value by multiplying the Unadjusted Function Point (UFP) value with the Value Adjustment Factor (VAF) value.
